title: Expense Reimbursement Process and Submission Deadlines
text:
Q: What is the process for submitting expense reimbursements and what are the deadlines?
A: To submit an expense reimbursement, employees must complete the Expense Reimbursement Form available on the company intranet. All receipts must be attached and clearly labeled with the purpose of the expense. Submissions should be made within 30 days of incurring the expense to ensure timely processing. The completed form and receipts should be submitted to your direct supervisor for approval. Once approved, it will be forwarded to the Finance Department for processing. Reimbursements are typically processed within two pay cycles. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact the Finance Department at finance@company.com.
